message:
feat(bun): Add runtime filtering to daemon worker selection

- Add `normalize_command()` to patterns.rs for stripping wrappers
  (sudo, time, env, etc.) before classification
- Update Tier 3/4 classification to use normalized commands
- Add `required_runtime` parameter to daemon query protocol
- Hook now determines RequiredRuntime based on CompilationKind:
  - BunTest/BunTypecheck → RequiredRuntime::Bun
  - Cargo* → RequiredRuntime::Rust
- Daemon API parses `runtime=` query parameter for filtering
- Tests for wrapped command classification and runtime parsing

Part of Bun support epic (remote_compilation_helper-r2f)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
